MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-28-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-28-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: July 28, 2008

This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Scott D. Peebles, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Curry Sr. Ctr. Corp., f/k/a N. of Market Sr. Services.
David Knego, a Corporate Officer for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Eric Yorke.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on July 1, 2008.

Plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1---Associated Lease Agreement dated 2/11/05---------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Thirty-Day Notice to Terminate Tenancy dated 1/14/08---------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3---Proof of Service of Thirty-Day Notice
to Terminate Tenancy dated 1/14/08---------------------------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Curry Sr. Ctr. Corp., f/k/a N. of Market Sr. Services, and against defendant Eric Yorke as follows:

Plaintiff Curry Sr. Ctr. Corp., f/k/a N. of Market Sr. Services shall recover from defendant Eric Yorke Rent/Per Diem Damages in the amount of $1,072.00, Costs in the amount of $245.00, for a Total Judgment in the amount of $1,317.00.

Plaintiff Curry Sr. Ctr. Corp., f/k/a N. of Market Sr. Services is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 321 Turk Street, #13, San Francisco, CA 94102. The lease is forfeited.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the Exhibits.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-24-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Scott Peebles, Esq., for plaintiff Curry Senior Center. Rick Crane was present with authority for plaintiff.
Defendant did not appear.

Settlement Conference ordered off calendar: Defendant not present. Trial remains on calendar. Hon. William R. Gargano. Clerk: Garth Sayers. Not reported. (218)

Notice Of Hearing And Motion To Compel Deft To Verify Discovery Responses And To Further Respond To Pltf'S Special Interrogatories, Set One, Special Interrogatories, Set Two; And Requests For Admission, Set One;
Off Calendar Jul-24-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Scott Peebles, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party; no other appearances.

TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiff Curry Sr. Center Corp., FKA N. of Market Sr. Services' Motion To Compel Defendant To Verify Responses, For Further Response To Plaintiff' Special Interrogatories (Set One), Special Interrogatories (Set Two), and Requests For Admission (Set One) granted in part, denied in part:
1. Defendant shall provide plaintiff's counsel with verification of defendant's responses to plaintiff's Special Interrogatories [Set One] and Special Interrogatories [Set Two] (and any amended or supplemental responses) by personal delivery on or before July 25, 2008 at 4:00 p.m.
2. Defendant shall provide a verified, supplemental response to Special Interrogatories (Set Two), Interrogatory Number 10, by personal delivery to plaintiff's counsel on or before July 28, 2008 at 12:00 noon.
3. Motion To Compel Further Response To Plaintiff's Special Interrogatories (Set One) denied.
4. No documents, argument or authorities were submitted pertaining to plaintiff's Requests For Admission; therefore the issue is deemed abandoned. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. Not Reported
